__source_notes.__reference: RP2040 datasheet (rev e), §3 (PIO) and Table 2-7 (DREQ assignments)
__source_notes.__notes: Each PIO block has 4 state machines, 32-instruction shared instruction memory, and 4-word TX/RX FIFOs per SM (joinable to 8 via SHIFTCTRL). Both blocks can address all 30 GPIO pins. Per-state-machine DREQs are derived as `dreq_{tx,rx}_base + sm_index`.
